title: Gas/liquid chromatography
summary: 9701 A Level GLC — retention time, separation, and quantitative analysis.
learningObjectives: Explain mobile and stationary phases in GLC.
Describe quantitative use of peak areas.

simpleExplanation.title: Volatile mixtures separated by gas
simpleExplanation.summary: A carrier gas sweeps volatile sample through a column coated with liquid stationary phase. Components elute at different times.
steps: Sample must be volatile or derivatised.
More polar interacts longer — later peak.

sections.content: **GLC** (37.2) complements **37.1 TLC** for **volatile organic mixtures**. Know **retention time** vs **Rf**.
